jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Pilgrim
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Pilgrim! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Pilgrim:
Pilgrim is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pilgrim!
